posts.author: RobaSolutions (Leon from Roba Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello monday Community!

I’m excited to introduce DocuDraw - a new app for the monday Marketplace that combines a powerful rich text editor and a flexible whiteboard in one seamless interface:

Gallery31920×960 209 KB

What is DocuDraw?

Many of us know the frustration of constantly switching between different tools when creating documents and visualizing ideas. DocuDraw solves this by integrating both in a single workspace directly within your monday environment.

The left side features a complete rich text editor with all the formatting options you need (headings, lists, bold text, etc.), while the right side offers a versatile whiteboard where you can create diagrams, sketches, and mind maps. This combination allows you to capture both structured text and visual thinking without ever leaving monday.

Simplify Your Workflow with an Integrated Solution

If you’re currently using external tools like Miro, FigJam, Lucidchart, or even switching between Notion and drawing tools, DocuDraw offers a streamlined alternative directly within monday. No more context switching or managing multiple subscriptions - everything you need for documentation and visualization is now integrated in your Monday workspace.

A key advantage: Your team already has access to all documents through monday - no need to share additional links, manage permissions on other platforms, or worry about who can see what. If monday is your team’s primary platform, DocuDraw eliminates the hassle of switching tools and resharing resources.

Use Cases: What is DocuDraw useful for?

DocuDraw simplifies workflows where you previously had to switch between different tools:

  1. Technical Documentation: DocuDraw is especially well-suited for technical documentation that requires both precise text and visual representations (as seen in the screenshot above).
  2. Project Planning: Document requirements in the text editor and visualize workflows right beside them.
  3. Concept Development: Capture your ideas in text form and simultaneously sketch initial visual implementations.

Try DocuDraw Today!

Ready to streamline your documentation process? DocuDraw is available with a free 14-day trial - simply search for “DocuDraw” in the monday Marketplace to get started!

Install the app and experience how it transforms your workflow. I’d love to hear about your experience using DocuDraw with your specific use cases!

Have questions or need assistance? Share your thoughts in the comments below or reach out directly to me at support@roba-solutions.com

Looking forward to seeing what you create with DocuDraw!
